page: Microsoft Azure DC8es_v5 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the DCEV5 server family. Powered by an Intel processor, this instance features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding an allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include local storage, but it is premium storage capable, allowing users to attach external persistent volumes. There are no bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the DC8es_v5 is designed for general-purpose workloads, database management, and memory-conscious applications that do not require local NVMe storage. Its dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance, making it a cost-efficient option for enterprise workloads requiring stable resource density without the overhead of local disk maintenance.
description: Microsoft Azure DC8es_v5 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine from the DCEV5 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced resource allocation of 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not feature local storage but is premium storage capable, allowing the attachment of high-performance external storage volumes. It contains no graphics processing units and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given its dedicated compute resources and balanced memory-to-core ratio, the DC8es_v5 is structured for general-purpose applications, relational databases, and enterprise workloads that prioritize consistent CPU performance and flexible external storage configurations over local disk space. This configuration offers a stable, predictable environment for hosting application servers and mid-sized database systems.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC8es_v5 is a Hyper-V virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and premium storage capability, designed for general-purpose and memory-conscious enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core virtual machine featuring a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and premium external storage compatibility for consistent enterprise workloads.

32.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
